headline: The Cigna Group Foundation Invites Memphis-Area Nonprofits to Apply for $250,000 Grants to Improve Health Care Access
summary: Building on years of community investment and employee volunteerism across Tennessee, The Cigna Group Foundation, the philanthropic arm of The Cigna Group (NYSE: CI), today announced the expansion of its Impact Fund to Memphis. The expansion reflects the Foundation's continued focus on advancing population health by complementing prior investments in youth and veteran mental health and addressing additional barriers that shape long–term health and well–being.

content.title: The Cigna Group Foundation Invites Memphis-Area Nonprofits to Apply for $250,000 Grants to Improve Health Care Access
content.summary: Building on years of community investment and employee volunteerism across Tennessee, The Cigna Group Foundation, the philanthropic arm of The Cigna Group (NYSE: CI), today announced the expansion of its Impact Fund to Memphis. The expansion reflects the Foundation's continued focus on advancing population health by complementing prior investments in youth and veteran mental health and addressing additional barriers that shape long–term health and well–being.

thumbnail.caption: Employee volunteers from The Cigna Group assembled hundreds of jump ropes, inflated dozens of basketballs and built much-needed furniture items for the Boys & Girls Clubs of Middle Tennessee.
